title: AULE Metallic Purple Balloons: 50 Pcs 12 inch Chrome Dark Purple Party Balloons Shiny Latex Helium Thicken Balloon Bachelor Party Halloween Wedding Birthday Decoration
features: NEW METALLIC BALLOONS - The pack of 50 purple metallic balloons with helium is perfect for all kinds of party or anniversary decorations. We have a wide range of color options and styles available for you to choose from, allowing you the freedom to mix and match as you please

HIGH-QUALITY PARTY BALLOONS - The 12-inch purple latex balloons are made of high-quality latex and are safe for use around children. Each of these dark purple balloons weighs 2.8 grams and features a metallic surface that is brighter than ordinary latex balloons

BALLOONS CAN BE FILLED WITH - These violet helium balloons can be filled with air, helium, and water. The inflated state of the dark purple latex balloons can be maintained for at least 2 days. If filled with helium, the purple chrome balloons can remain in a floating state for 8-12 hours. Unique design of violet eco-friendly balloons for the party

APPLICATIONS - The premium purple eco balloons are perfect party decorations, party accessories, party supplies, party essentials, party decor for Bachelor Party, Halloween, Mardi Gras, Summer Party, Wedding, Birthday and other party decorations in the new, fresh style
AFTER-SALES SERVICE - We are committed to providing the best service. If you have any problems during use, please contact us by email, we will try our best to address your issue
description: Product Description AULE Balloons The package of 50 metallised balloons with helium is perfect for any type of party or anniversary decoration. These balloons can be inflated with air, helium and water. The inflated condition of the yellow latex balloons can be maintained for at least 2 days. Why Choose Us: High-quality and safe party decorations. AULE Balloon has won the trust of thousands of satisfied customers. Our goal is to make every beautiful occasion a special day. The customer experience is our top priority. We have ten years of experience in designing decoration products and are committed to creating the most suitable decoration products for your parties, birthdays and events.
